zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Morteyn於大約1288年出生在英國貝德福爾時，她的父親John de Morteyn III16歲，母親Joan Rothwell6歲。她於1309年與John Chamberlaine在英國貝德福爾斯坦別利其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1324年之前在英國貝德福爾斯坦別利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Morteyn于大约1288年出生在英国貝德福爾时，她的父亲John de Morteyn III16岁，母亲Joan Rothwell6岁。她于1309年与John Chamberlaine在英国貝德福爾斯坦別利其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1324年之前在英国貝德福爾斯坦別利其。

nameMeanings.name: Morteyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

variants.name: Morton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Morteyn was born about 1288, in Bedfordshire, England, her father, John de Morteyn III, was 16 and her mother, Joan Rothwell, was 6. She married John Chamberlaine in 1309, in Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died before 1324, in Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Morteyn est née environ 1288, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Morteyn III, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Joan Rothwell, avait 6 ans. Elle a épousé John Chamberlaine en 1309, à Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée avant 1324, à Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Morteyn um 1288 in Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Morteyn III 16 und ihre Mutter Joan Rothwell 6. Sie hat 1309 in Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England John Chamberlaine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb vor 1324 in Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Morteyn è nata il circa 1288 nel Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, John de Morteyn III, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Joan Rothwell, aveva 6 anni. Lei sposato John Chamberlaine nel 1309, nel Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del 1324, nel Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Morteynが約1288年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Morteyn IIIは16歳，母Joan Rothwellは6歳であった。1309年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスタンブリッジでJohn Chamberlaineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1324年以前にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスタンブリッジで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Morteyn(이)가 대략 1288년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Morteyn III(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Rothwell(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 1309년 영국 베드퍼드실르 스탠브리지에서 John Chamberlaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1324년 이전 영국 베드퍼드실르 스탠브리지에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Morteyn nasceu aproximadamente 1288, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Morteyn III, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Joan Rothwell, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com John Chamberlaine em 1309, em Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu antes 1324, em Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Morteyn родилась около 1288 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Morteyn III было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Rothwell, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Chamberlaine в 1309 г. в местности станбридж, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла перед 1324 г. в местности станбридж, бедфордшир, Англия.

Se casó con John Chamberlaine en 1309, en Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió antes de 1324, en Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
